# apple-music-cleaner

> Bulk-remove Apple Music favorites or wipe your library. No paid Apple Developer account. CLI + local web UI.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Coding agent guide
- [Mac library DB](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/docs/mac-library-db.md): Play counts via Music.app on macOS
- [Recommendations reset](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/docs/recommendations-reset.md): Reset taste profile after wipe

## Install

- `npm install -g apple-music-cleaner` or `npx apple-music-cleaner`
- Requires Node.js 20+

## Commands

- `apple-music-cleaner --preset stale-favorites` — dry-run stale favorites
- `apple-music-cleaner dislikes --execute` — remove dislikes
- `apple-music-cleaner empty-playlists --execute` — delete empty playlists
- `apple-music-cleaner snapshot save before.json` — inventory snapshot
- `apple-music-cleaner resume failures.json` — retry failed deletions

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT
